narrative:
Green (precinct in Clinton County) has 977 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.8 percentage points.
